blocks.text: Loosen the bolts and tighten them to the extent that each component does not move. Adjust the position and closure of the tailgate (A). Tighten the bolts. Ensure that the tailgate locks securely and opens smoothly. Install the tailgate open stay.

items.text: Adjust the gap between the tailgate and the body by adjusting the tailgate hinge (B) in the left/right direction. When adjusting in the left/right direction, the striker (C) must also be adjusted at the same time.

Adjust the gap between the tailgate and the body by adjusting the tailgate hinge (B) in the left/right direction. When adjusting in the left/right direction, the striker (C) must also be adjusted at the same time.
Tailgate Rotate the cushion (D) to adjust the tailgate rear end in the forward/backward direction.
Tailgate Rotate the cushion (D) to adjust the tailgate rear end in the forward/backward direction.

The striker shall be adjusted in the forward/backward direction to adjust the closing of the tailgate. The striker shall also be adjusted in the left/right direction so that it locks in the center without interference with the tailgate lock (E).

The striker shall be adjusted in the forward/backward direction to adjust the closing of the tailgate. The striker shall also be adjusted in the left/right direction so that it locks in the center without interference with the tailgate lock (E).

blocks.text: Apply touch-up paint to each hinge mounting bolt and tailgate hinge mounting area to prevent rust. Apply grease to the tailgate hinge (A) at the location shown in the figure.
